recommendations.title: Balto
recommendations.overview: An outcast half-wolf risks his life to prevent a deadly epidemic from ravaging Nome, Alaska.

recommendations.title: The Prince of Egypt
recommendations.overview: The strong bond between two Royal Egyptian brothers is challenged when their chosen responsibilities set them at odds, with extraordinary consequences.
recommendations.director: Simon Wells, Steve Hickner, Brenda Chapman

recommendations.title: Mars Needs Moms
recommendations.overview: When Martians suddenly abduct his mom, mischievous Milo rushes to the rescue and discovers why all moms are so special.

recommendations.title: We're Back! A Dinosaur's Story

recommendations.director: Dick Zondag, Phil Nibbelink, Ralph Zondag, Simon Wells

recommendations.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West

recommendations.title: The Time Machine
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Romance
recommendations.overview: A Victorian Englishman travels to the far future and finds that humanity has divided into two hostile species.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
recommendations.overview: The ultimate X-Men ensemble fights a war for the survival of the species across two time periods as they join forces with their younger selves in an epic battle that must change the past – to save our future.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
recommendations.overview: Following the events of Captain America: Civil War, Peter Parker, with the help of his mentor Tony Stark, tries to balance his life as an ordinary high school student in Queens, New York City, with fighting crime as his superhero alter ego Spider-Man
